title: chore(deps): update dependency places.js to v1.17.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [places.js](https://community.algolia.com/places) ([source](https://togithub.com/algolia/places)) | devDependencies | minor | [`1.16.6` -> `1.17.0`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/places.js/1.16.6/1.17.0) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>algolia/places</summary>

### [`v1.17.0`](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​1170httpsgithubcomalgoliaplacescomparev1166v1170-2019-10-28)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/compare/v1.16.6...v1.17.0)

##### Bug Fixes

-   **get-val:** call autocompleteInstance.val instead ac.autocomplete.getVal ([#​919](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/issues/919)) ([6621655](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/commit/662165568edd5fcbd7e51ace2d75a20709500cf8))

##### Features

-   **accessibility:** allow modification of attributes on pin and clear buttons ([#​920](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/issues/920)) ([41cbd09](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/commit/41cbd09718d3109e364da91af27b8f9bdff4667c))

#### [1.16.6](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/compare/v1.16.5...v1.16.6) (2019-10-09)

##### Bug Fixes

-   **typings:** include types field in package.json ([#​907](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/issues/907)) ([4d70e28](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/commit/4d70e28))

#### [1.16.5](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/compare/v1.16.4...v1.16.5) (2019-09-30)

##### Bug Fixes

-   **autocomplete-css:** use babel transpiling for places.css ([#​887](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/issues/887)) ([fcc7112](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/commit/fcc7112))
-   **deps:** update dependency autocomplete.js to ^0.37.0 ([d03e08f](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/commit/d03e08f))
-   **rate-limit-ci:** Use authenticated places app in E2E tests ([#​893](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/issues/893)) ([6a9e506](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/commit/6a9e506))

#### [1.16.4](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/compare/v1.16.3...v1.16.4) (2019-04-15)

##### Features

-   **invalid-credentials:** clearer warning message in console ([#​768](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/pull/768)) ([e68b1e8](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/commit/e68b1e8))

#### [1.16.3](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/compare/v1.16.2...v1.16.3) (2019-04-01)

##### Bug Fixes

-   **set-val-icon:** show correct icon when calling setVal ([#​760](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/issues/760)) ([3050e15](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/commit/3050e15))

#### [1.16.2](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/compare/v1.16.1...v1.16.2) (2019-04-01)

##### Bug Fixes

-   **empty-postcode-list:** fix a bug where an empty postcode list could crash results ([#​759](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/issues/759)) ([a9228a4](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/commit/a9228a4))

#### [1.16.1](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/compare/v1.15.5...v1.16.1) (2019-02-25)

##### Features

-   **controlled-search:** expose search method in places.js ([#​659](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/issues/659)) ([4ddd681](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/commit/4ddd681))

#### [1.15.5](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/compare/v1.15.4...v1.15.5) (2019-02-05)

##### Bug Fixes

-   **promise-polyfill:** remove babel-polyfill and let babel do magic ([#​726](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/issues/726)) ([be9170b](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/commit/be9170b))

##### Bug Fixes

#### [1.15.2](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/compare/v1.15.1...v1.15.2) (2019-01-18)

#### [1.15.1](https://togithub.com/algolia/places/compare/v1.15.0...v1.15.1) (2018-12-14)

</details>
